use rayon::prelude::*;
use std::sync::Arc;

struct RuleCatalog {
    rules: Vec<Rule>,
    patterns: Vec<Pattern>,
    config: Config,
}

// GOOD: share via Arc, clone only cheap handles
fn lint_files(files: &[PathBuf], catalog: &RuleCatalog) -> Vec<LintResult> {
    let catalog = Arc::new(catalog);
    files.par_iter()
        .map(|file| {
            let content = std::fs::read_to_string(file).unwrap();
            lint_with_catalog(&content, &catalog)
        })
        .collect()
}

fn process_with_context(items: &[Item], ctx: &Context) -> Vec<Output> {
    let ctx = Arc::new(ctx);
    items.par_iter()
        .map(|item| {
            process_item(item, &ctx)
        })
        .collect()
}
